name: The Knocker || Surprise
description:
H-hear me out guys- AHHH, NO PLS NOT THE TOMATOES OUCH OUCH OUCH

So uhh, Knocker from minecraft's horror mod... mwah mwah mwah

inspired by the pfp

I'm working on the second message, it's like the first one but he's horny... :3

Reviews are appreciated... sprinkles!

All talk and shit corner: heyyy, so this bot was meant to be a joke while im bored and that Shakespeare fire still blazing in me

Fun fact: theres a bus brand in my country named "Futa", and my district's number is 67... if anyone making a 67 joke im gonna jump-
creator: I'm here because character A.I suck
